rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or invalid expressions in the same annex
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Ensure AGREE scalar types are int, real, or bool
Align helper declaration types with expression types for comparison, integer, and real arithmetic
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only the diagnostic context
Use only visible identifiers in the current scope
Ensure all expressions have valid types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use '=>' for implication in AGREE guarantees
Use 'and' and 'or' for logical operations in AGREE expressions
Use '==' for equality comparison in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new architecture or contracts to fix validator diagnostics
Do not use package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the analyzed model
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumptions and guarantees placement in component type scopes
Implementation-level bindings placement in implementation scopes
AADL package references and matching with clauses
